response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Verified that the audio matches the video's spoken dialogue and visual contexts. No lyrics/song vocals were present; the audio consisted of speech and sound effects.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON served as a scene-by-scene guide, confirming the absence of vocal music. Manual transcription and translation were carried out for all scenes to capture the playful, frantic dialogue between Laplus Darkness, her producer, Choco-sensei, and Himawari.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were accurately aligned with the vocal bursts to prevent cascading delays, ensuring clear pacing and logic in splits (especially in rapid conversational segments).

subtitles.original: 今日は本当におめでと～！ラプくん、また遊ぼうね～
subtitles.english: Congratulations on today! Lap-kun, let's hang out again~

subtitles.original: あ、あじゅねぇ！あじゅねぇえええ！！！
subtitles.english: Ah, Aju-nee! Aju-neee!!!

subtitles.original: え、はい、はい、分かりました！
subtitles.english: Uh, yes, yes, I understand!

subtitles.original: ラプラスさん！新曲オーディションですって！
subtitles.english: Laplus-san! It's an audition for a new song!

subtitles.original: どゆこと！？
subtitles.english: What do you mean?!

subtitles.original: 新曲だけのオーディション大会があって、そこで優勝したら、大型コラボですって！
subtitles.english: There's an audition tournament for new songs, and if you win, you get a major collaboration!

subtitles.original: 今すぐ曲準備します！
subtitles.english: I'll prepare the song right away!

subtitles.original: ダンスレッスンいれますね！
subtitles.english: I'll schedule a dance lesson!

subtitles.original: 今から新曲？ダンスレッスン？ま、間に合うのそれ？もうライブまでちょっとしかないよ？
subtitles.english: A new song starting now? Dance lessons? W-Will we make it? There's barely any time left until the live concert!

subtitles.original: 間に合わせてください！もしオーディションに合格したら、大型コラボなんです！！
subtitles.english: Please make it in time! If you pass the audition, it's a major collaboration!!

subtitles.original: えー！我輩もう疲れたんですけど！！大型コラボってなんなの！？
subtitles.english: What?! But I'm already exhausted!! What even is this major collaboration?!

subtitles.original: それはまだ、秘密です。
subtitles.english: That is still a secret.

subtitles.original: なんでだよおお！！！
subtitles.english: Why?! Come on!!!

subtitles.original: …はぁ、はぁ、はぁ、はぁ、はぁ、体力ないって言ってるのに、走り込み…？
subtitles.english: ...*pant*, *pant*, *pant*, *pant*, *pant*... I told you I have no stamina, so why running...?

subtitles.original: だからこその走り込みです！
subtitles.english: That is exactly why you're running!

subtitles.original: …はぁ、この筋トレ、本当に意味あるの？
subtitles.english: ...*sigh*, is this muscle training really necessary?

subtitles.original: …だっ、はぁ、あああ…
subtitles.english: ...*pant*, *gasp*, aaa...

subtitles.original: よし！良い感じだ！
subtitles.english: Alright! Looking good!

subtitles.original: ラプラスさん！本番前に行きましょう！あの方の元へ！
subtitles.english: Laplus-san! Let's go before the show! To that person's place!

subtitles.original: あ、あの方！？あー…よし！行こう！！
subtitles.english: T-That person?! Ah... alright! Let's go!!

subtitles.original: チョコ先生！！！
subtitles.english: Choco-sensei!!!

subtitles.original: あら、いらっしゃい、ラプちゃん。
subtitles.english: Oh, welcome, Lapu-chan.

subtitles.original: どれにするの？
subtitles.english: Which one will you choose?

subtitles.original: ん～、悩んじゃうよねぇ。
subtitles.english: Hmm, it's hard to decide, isn't it?

subtitles.original: わかる、わかる。
subtitles.english: I know, I know.

subtitles.original: 答えは一つじゃないからねぇ。
subtitles.english: Because there isn't just one right answer.

subtitles.original: ラプちゃん、真剣に考えてるわねぇ。
subtitles.english: Lapu-chan, thinking so seriously about it.

subtitles.original: え？全部ちゃんと見たいの？
subtitles.english: Eh? You want to take a proper look at all of them?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、皆さんお待ちかねの、グッズ情報よ！ラプちゃん！
subtitles.english: Then, here is the merchandise information everyone's been waiting for! Lapu-chan!

subtitles.original: はい！はいはいはい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes yes yes!

subtitles.original: ラプラス・ダークネス、誕生日記念2026グッズ！順番に紹介していきます！
subtitles.english: Laplus Darkness's Birthday Celebration 2026 Merchandise! We'll introduce them one by one!

subtitles.original: じゃん！まずはこちら！カードアルバム！
subtitles.english: Ta-da! First up is this! The Card Album!

subtitles.original: 特典のチェキ風ブロマイドカードとか、ホロカとかを収納できるアルバムです！
subtitles.english: It's an album where you can store special instax-style photo cards, Holoka cards, and more!

subtitles.original: えっと、めっちゃ久しぶりに三輪先生が…
subtitles.english: And, after a really long time, Miwa-sensei...

subtitles.original: 我輩のママね、クロネママが描き下ろしてくれました、イラスト！
subtitles.english: My illustrator mama, Kurone-mama, has drawn a new illustration for this!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ可愛い！！！
subtitles.english: That's so cute!!!

subtitles.original: はい、でしょ？
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: このアルバムをギュッてしてるのがまたいいよね。
subtitles.english: The way you're hugging this album is so nice.

subtitles.original: そう、そうでしょ？これもちゃんと、あのアルバムをギュッとしてるんですよ、売ってるやつを。
subtitles.english: Exactly, right? This illustration actually shows me hugging the album that is on sale.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、これ買ったら、ラプちゃんがギュッとしたアルバムが手に入るってこと？
subtitles.english: So if someone buys this, they get the album that you hugged?

subtitles.original: え？！それは、あの、商品法…景表法的に…
subtitles.english: Eh?! Well, that might violate, uh, product laws... or the Premiums and Representations Act...

subtitles.original: 二つ目はこちら！興奮ボイスキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: The second item is this! The Excited Voice Keyholder!

subtitles.original: 毎回おなじみの、録り下ろしボイスが6種類入ったキーホルダーです！
subtitles.english: It's the usual keyholder containing 6 newly recorded voices!

subtitles.original: 押すと声が出ます、いつも通り。今回も白こ先…白こ先生の描き下ろしです！
subtitles.english: You can press it to play the voices as always. This time, it's also drawn by Shiroko-sensei!

subtitles.original: メロメロな表情をしたオリジナルのデフォルメ姿です。
subtitles.english: It features an original chibi-style illustration with a love-struck face.

subtitles.original: 押すと声が出る。
subtitles.english: Pressing it plays a voice.

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: えー、どこを押すのかな？
subtitles.english: Hmm, I wonder where we should press?

subtitles.original: え、ど…ちょっと、どこを…み、三つ目は！三つ目はこちら！
subtitles.english: Wait, wha... hold on, where are you... T-The third! The third item is this!

subtitles.original: ばぶラプラスぬいぐるみです！
subtitles.english: The Baby Laplus Plushie!

subtitles.original: おしゃぶりを…おしゃぶりをくわえて、ベビーウェアを着て寝ている我輩のぬいぐるみでございます。
subtitles.english: It's a plushie of me sucking on a pacifier, wearing baby clothes, and sleeping.

subtitles.original: え、めっちゃ可愛い！
subtitles.english: Oh, that's incredibly cute!

subtitles.original: 我輩もギュッてしたい！
subtitles.english: I want to hug you tight too!

subtitles.original: チョコ先生、そ、それは…
subtitles.english: Choco-sensei, th-that is...

subtitles.original: ギュッてしたい！
subtitles.english: I want to hug you!

subtitles.original: いつでも…いつでも、あ、あ、あああ！やめてください！本当に！
subtitles.english: A-Anytime... anytime... Ah, ah, aaa! Please stop! Seriously!

subtitles.original: もうまずいまずい、四つ目はこちら！
subtitles.english: This is bad, this is bad! The fourth item is this!

subtitles.original: ばぶラプラスぬいぐるみを包めるハンカチです！
subtitles.english: A handkerchief that can wrap the Baby Laplus Plushie!

subtitles.original: さっきのぬいぐるみを包めて、あとは普通にハンカチとしても使えます。
subtitles.english: You can wrap the plushie I just showed you, and you can also use it as a normal handkerchief.

subtitles.original: おくるみとして使えるってことね。
subtitles.english: So it can be used as a swaddling blanket.

subtitles.original: そうです。可愛い！デカ、デカいです、これ。これくらいしかないです、大きさ。
subtitles.english: Yes. It's cute! It's big, actually quite big. Its size is about this much.

subtitles.original: そして最後に！フルセット購入特典として、三輪クロネママ描き下ろしのチェキ風ブロマイドカードがついてきます！
subtitles.english: And finally! As a full set purchase bonus, you'll get an instax-style photo card drawn by Miwa Kurone-mama!

subtitles.original: はい、数量限定バージョンは、我輩の直筆サインと複製メッセージが入ってます！
subtitles.english: Yes! The limited-quantity version includes my hand-written signature and a printed message!
